# Stridely - Strava Running Analytics with AI Recommendations

## Project Overview
Personal web application to connect with Strava API, retrieve running data, and provide AI-powered training recommendations and race plans.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: React 18+
- **Build Tool**: Vite
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Package Manager**: npm

## Project Structure
```
stridely/
├── src/
│   ├── components/
│   ├── pages/
│   ├── services/
│   ├── hooks/
│   ├── types/
│   ├── App.tsx
│   └── main.tsx
├── public/
├── index.html
├── vite.config.ts
├── tsconfig.json
└── package.json
```

## Development Guidelines
- TypeScript strict mode enabled
- Component-based architecture
- API integration layer for Strava
- Modular service structure for scalability
- AI integration planned for future phases
